content.title: Itikaf begins from Maghrib today
content.subtitle: Let’s try to sit for Itikaf
content.body:
We are social beings. We spend the entire year in society—business, jobs, family. We take a break from all of this during the time of Salat. That is when we build a relationship with Allah.

How would it be if we could take a slightly longer break?

Itikaf is a magnificent act of worship that makes other acts of worship easier. The Messenger of Allah (peace and blessings of Allah be upon him) used to complete the recitation of the Quran once every Ramadan; were you unable to do so?

Go into Itikaf.

Read the Quran from beginning to end, recite it, and read the meaning. Do not talk to people. Do not take a phone with you. Even if you take it to read the Quran, keep it on airplane mode.

In other words, keep yourself disconnected from people and the world.

There will be nothing else to do except eating and sleeping. Just read the Quran and reflect on the meanings. Look at the night sky and make Du'a. You can take one or two good books.

You will see that gradually you are able to speak with Allah. You are beginning to understand the words of Allah.

Keeping a good relationship with Allah is very important, brothers—this is the very reason we were created.
